duration_rule.closed_incidents: calendar days from open_date to close_date
duration_rule.open_incidents: calendar days from open_date to analysis_date

percentage_rule.denominator: all incidents in the filtered Q1 population

top_escalation_order: incident_count descending, then total_resolution_cost descending, then supplier_id ascending

codes.ESCALATE_SUPPLIER: Use when the supplier is on quality_hold with at least 3 filtered incidents, or has any critical RMA, or has at least 3 RMAs and at least 15000.00 total filtered resolution cost.
codes.PROCESS_REVIEW: Use when WORK_ORDER incidents are at least 3 and exceed RMA incidents.
codes.WATCHLIST: Use when the supplier quality_status is watch or quality_hold, or filtered incident_count is at least 4, or total filtered resolution cost is at least 12000.00, or severe_incident_count is at least 2.
codes.MONITOR: Use when none of the higher-precedence conditions apply.
